name: ai-suggestion-list
title: AI Suggestion List
description: Responsive container for prompt chips or suggestion cards, with row, scroll, and grid layouts.

props.name: layout
props.description: `row` wraps chips, `scroll` keeps them on one line, `grid` goes two-up for cards on wide containers.

props.name: showLabel
props.description: Render the label visibly as well.

props.name: empty
props.description: Rendered instead of the list when there is nothing to suggest. Without it, an empty list renders nothing.

clinicalNotes: This is layout only: it accepts suggestions and emits selection, and it never ranks, filters, or infers what to suggest — that inference belongs to your product, where it can be governed. Rendering nothing when there are no suggestions is deliberate: an assistant that pads an empty state with generic prompts ("ask me anything about this patient") invites questions it cannot ground in the record. `scroll` exists for narrow surfaces where a wrapping row would push the composer off screen mid-consultation.
notes: Uses a @container so `grid` responds to the chat shell's width, not the viewport's — the same list works in a narrow sheet and a full-page workspace.
